name: Fortified Assembly
text:
Cannot be a stronghold province. This province gets +2 strength for each honor token on it.
Reaction: After an attack is declared against this province – place 1 honor token on it.

name: Emperor's Summons
text:
Seeker role only.
Reaction: After this province is revealed – search your dynasty deck for a character card and put it faceup into a non-stronghold province you control, discarding each other card in the province. Shuffle.

name: Student of Anatomies
text: Action: Sacrifice a (friendly) character. Choose a character – until the end of the phase, treat that character as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits).

name: Graceful Guardian
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – during each player's next action opportunity in this conflict, increase the cost to play cards by 1.

name: Iron Crane Legion
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
During conflicts in which you are the attacking or defending player, X is equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand. (Otherwise, X is zero.)

name: Togashi Yoshi
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – gain 1 fate from an unclaimed ring.

name: Truthseeker
text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose a deck – look at the top 3 cards of that deck and put them back in any order.

name: Ikoma Kiyono
text: Interrupt: When a glory count would begin, if you are more honorable than your opponent – ready this character.

name: Righteous Delegate
text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict – each participating Bushi character gets -1 [mil] and -1 [pol] and each participating non-Bushi character gets +1 [mil] and +1 [pol] until the end of the conflict.

name: Starry Heaven Sanctuary
text:
Limit 1 per deck.
Reaction: After fate is removed from characters in the fate phase, if 4 or more fate was removed – gain 2 fate.

name: Emissary of Lies
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character controlled by your opponent – your opponent guesses the name of a card. You may reveal your hand. If you do, and the named card is not in your hand, move the chosen character home.

name: Licensed Quarter
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict – your opponent discards the top card of his or her conflict deck. (Unlimited.)

name: Ide Ryōma
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a  character and a non- character controlled by the same player – bow one of the characters. If you do, ready the other.

name: Hantei Daisetsu
text:
Sincerity
Action: During a [pol] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character – until the end of the conflict, treat that character as if its printed text box were blank (except for Traits).

name: Sharpened Tsuruhashi
text: Interrupt: When attached character is sacrificed – return this card to your hand.

name: Issue a Challenge
text: Reaction: After a Bushi character you control attacks alone – your opponent cannot declare more than 1 character as a defender in this conflict.

name: Rising Stars Kata
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating unique character – that character gets +3[mil] until the end of the conflict (+5[mil] instead if that character has won a duel this conflict). (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Regal Bearing
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict in which you control a participating Courtier character – set the bid on your honor dial to 1. Then, draw cards equal to the difference between your honor bid and that of your opponent. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Invoke the Divine
text: Action: Play up to 3 Spell cards with printed total cost 5 or less from your hand without paying their costs (This includes costs other than fate costs.)

name: Unspoken Etiquette
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict – dishonor each participating non-Courtier character.

name: Natural Negotiator
text:
Attach to a Courtier character you control.
Action: During a conflict, give your opponent 1 honor – switch attached character's base [mil] and [pol] skills until the end of the conflict.

name: Overhear
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict – your opponent reveals a random card from his or her hand and puts it on top of his or her conflict deck. If you control a participating Courtier character, you may give your opponent 1 honor to resolve this ability twice.
